records.desired_data: Historical AIS position, static vessel, dark activity, port events for REGIONAL_BBOX over the past 72h+.
records.why_it_matters: Best available route to real vessel behavior and dark-gap validation.

records.desired_data: Satellite AIS history and static vessel identity for Hormuz/Gulf of Oman.
records.why_it_matters: Corroborates AISstream/GFW where terrestrial AIS is sparse or delayed.

records.desired_data: Vessel tracks, port calls, arrival/departure events, fleet lists for Bandar Abbas, Fujairah, Khor Fakkan, Sohar.
records.why_it_matters: Commercial AIS history for demo-grade vessel movement, if licensing allows caching.

records.desired_data: Cargo, tanker flows, oil/LNG load status, shadow fleet indicators, fixture/charter context.
records.why_it_matters: Turns regional disruption into supply-chain and energy-flow impact analysis.

records.desired_data: Ownership, management, class, insurer, safety/PSC fields for vessels of interest.
records.why_it_matters: Ownership/management chain for entity risk and sanctions enrichment.

records.desired_data: IMO number, ship particulars, company/registered owner fields, casualty/security circular references.
Regional AIS feed/export if user later decides to onboard it.
records.why_it_matters: Could improve free/low-cost live vessel behavior coverage, but current plan defers it.

records.desired_data: ADS-B NACp/NIC history over Persian Gulf/Gulf of Oman for GNSS interference detection.
records.why_it_matters: Independent RF/GNSS integrity context, not vessel behavior.
